message:
Add built-ins, fix slicing, and edge cases via wave 4

Agent 1: zip(), assert, isinstance(), type() - 1 test passing

Agent 2: Step slicing (::2, ::-1) - 7 slicing tests passing (100%)

Agent 3: Class string attrs, list.count() tracking - 3 tests passing

Results: 59/80 → 63/80 passing (78.75% pass rate, +4 tests, +5%)
